# Vendored: yyjson 0.10.0

Source: <https://github.com/ibireme/yyjson> (release `0.10.0`)

License: MIT (see `LICENSE`)

Files imported verbatim from upstream:

- `src/yyjson.h` -> `yyjson.h`
- `src/yyjson.c` -> `yyjson.c`
- `LICENSE`

To update, fetch a new tagged release archive from GitHub and overwrite the three files above.
